All right, in this video, we are not going to do any layering. We're just going to create one campaign per audience that we already made. Now what you see is the results of about 24 hours or so of these campaigns running. And I don't want to go into the stats of these yet because the conversion stats are delayed almost all the time in Google. So these look, these are actually better than they look, but we'll deal with that later.
